text.title: negotiation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for negotiation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: First offers are anchors, not final positions. Accepting immediately signals that the offer was too generous, which the counterparty will remember in future negotiations.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Email removes tone and timing signals, which are 60-80% of negotiation information. Use email for documenting agreements, not for reaching them.
